vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to uneven heat distribution.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks or cooling channels.

risk.desc: Cable management may be compromised if harness routing is not properly secured.
risk.mit: Ensure strain relief and proper routing for all cables.

risk.desc: Fastener patterns may not align with load directions, leading to potential failure.
risk.mit: Review and adjust fastener patterns to align with load directions.

risk.desc: Insufficient inspection features may hinder maintenance and serviceability.
risk.mit: Increase the number of inspection access points and labels.

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment during assembly if datum references are not clear.
risk.mit: Ensure clear primary datum features and assembly sequences.

risk.desc: The estimated mass of the tool flange changer exceeds the target by 50g, potentially affecting the overall payload capacity.
risk.mit: Review the design for potential weight reduction opportunities, such as material optimization or process changes.

risk.desc: The design does not account for thermal expansion and contraction, which could affect the fit and function of the pneumatic lines and electrical connections.

risk.desc: The design does not specify the exact type of locking mechanism for the pneumatic locking system, which could lead to inconsistent performance.
risk.mit: Specify the type of locking mechanism and ensure it meets the required preload and torque specifications.

risk.desc: The design does not include a detailed disassembly sequence, which could complicate field serviceability.
risk.mit: Develop a detailed disassembly sequence and include it in the cad_brief.

risk.desc: The design does not explicitly state the stack-up tolerances for adjacent interfaces, which could lead to assembly issues.
risk.mit: Specify stack-up tolerances and fit classes for all adjacent interfaces.
